_description: Hub User Work Email Re-verification Challenge Email
_note: Sent when a hub user needs to re-verify their work email after 365 days
subject: Re-verify Your Work Email at Vetchium
body_intro: Your work email at {{.Domain}} requires annual re-verification to stay active. Please enter the code below on Vetchium within 30 days.
body_expiry: This code will expire in 24 hours. You have 30 days from today to complete re-verification before your work email status is ended.
body_ignore: If you did not expect this email, it means you have a verified work email at this domain on Vetchium. You can manage your work emails by logging into your account.
footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.
